title: HEALTHY FAMILIES - 211info
text: OLD MILL CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES HEALTHY FAMILIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Healthy Families Oregon focuses on strengthening the parent-child relationship to assure healthy child growth and development. Home visitors support parents in cultivating and strengthening a nurturing, positive relationship with their baby at each visit. Parents receive information on topics like child development, infant care and keeping their baby healthy, and learn what is going on in their communities to support new families. A trained home visitor coaches families as they build their skills as parents and help their baby be safe, healthy and learn. 1650 SW 45th Place Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Expectant families must enroll during pregnancy or before baby is 90 days old; services offered until child is 36 months old Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm Email (541) 757-8068 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 757-8068 Natalee Rothstein [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to register FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off of SW Country Club Drive between 35th and 53rd Streets. Shares a driveway with Starker Arts and Sunset Parks. Services: Child Abuse Prevention Home Based Parenting Education Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COURT MANDATED CO-PARENTING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RELIEF NURSERY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND FAMILY THERAPY REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - PEDIATRIC OCCUPATIONAL AND PHYSICAL THERAPY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OLD MILL CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES
